description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tetraweb/php:5.3 Docker image with a mysql:5.6 service and defines the variables MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD and WORDPRESS_ZIPFILE_NAME. In the global before_script run apt-get clean, apt-get -yqq update, apt-get -yqqf install zip unzip subversion mysql-client libmysqlclient-dev --fix-missing, docker-php-ext-enable mbstring mcrypt mysqli pdo_mysql intl gd zip bz2, and bash bin/install-wp-tests.sh wordpress_tests root mysql mysql latest true. Add a test stage job named "Testing with PHPUINIT PHP5.3:MySQL" that executes phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist, creates a code-examples-snippets directory, copies code-examples-snippets.php, readme.txt and the assets folder into it, and always uploads artifacts named $WORDPRESS_ZIPFILE_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME containing code-examples-snippets.zip and the code-examples-snippets/ directory on success.
